videos.headline: Cam Ward slings it to Jacolby George for a 13-yard Miami TD
videos.description: Cam Ward finds Jacolby George in the front corner of the end zone for a Miami touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Ward slings it to Jacolby George for a 13-yard Miami TD) 2024/11/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Hank Bachmeier airs it out to Micah Mays Jr. for a 36-yard Wake Forest TD
videos.description: Wake Forest answers quickly with a Hank Bachmeier to Micah Mays Jr. 36-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Hank Bachmeier airs it out to Micah Mays Jr. for a 36-yard Wake Forest TD) 2024/11/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Pick-six! Miami takes Hank Bachmeier INT to the house
videos.description: Miami's Mishael Powell picks off Hank Bachmeier and takes it 77 yards to the house for a Canes touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Pick-six! Miami takes Hank Bachmeier INT to the house) 2024/11/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Wake bounces back from pick-six with 100-yard kick return TD
videos.description: Demond Claiborne takes the kick return the full length of the field on the next play for Wake Forest.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Wake bounces back from pick-six with 100-yard kick return TD) 2024/11/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cam Ward breaks Miami record with 1st-down completion in 2nd quarter
videos.description: Cam Ward passes to Damien Martinez for a 13-yard first down to break the Miami record for passing yards in a season.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Ward breaks Miami record with 1st-down completion in 2nd quarter) 2024/11/23 ESHEET
